subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Inkling
source_quote: Thinking Machines Lab, the AI startup founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, released its first in-house AI model Wednesday morning, called Inkling . And unlike the flagship models from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google, it’s open-weight, meaning outside developers and companies can download it and modify it directly.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Inkling
source_quote: The clearest argument for Thinking Machines’ approach came from a recent project with Bridgewater Associates, the world’s largest hedge fund (which is not, for what it’s worth, a Thinking Machines investor). Researchers from both companies took an existing open-source model and trained it further on Bridgewater’s own financial expertise. The result was said to score 84.7% on financial reasoning tests, beating top proprietary AI models, while costing roughly a fourteenth as much to run — though those results come from the two companies’ own evaluation, not an independent one.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Inkling
source_quote: Inkling is a mixture-of-experts system with 975 billion total parameters, though it only draws on a fraction of that — about 41 billion — for any given task, a common design that keeps very large models faster and cheaper to run. It was trained on 45 trillion tokens of text, image, audio, and video, and reasons natively across all four, according to the company’s own release materials. For now, though, its outputs are limited to text, including code, styled artifacts, and structured data.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Inkling
source_quote: The model is Thinking Machines Labs’ first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view. Some of that work had already surfaced in a May research preview of “interaction models” — AI designed to listen and speak (and even interrupt) instead of stop and wait as with typical chatbots. It’s also a test of the central bet behind the startup, which is that AI that organizations can adapt for themselves will outperform the one-size-fits-all models the biggest labs currently sell.

subject: Ode with Anthropic
object: Fractional AI
source_quote: the applied AI services startup that Ode with Anthropic acquired earlier this year to serve as the new venture’s core

subject: 诺基亚
object: 基于英伟达的AI-RAN平台，声称业界首个
source_quote: Nokia’s AI-RAN platform arrived on July 15 with a claim worth examining: that it is the industry’s first. The vendor says the platform, built on its anyRAN software and NVIDIA’s Aerial system, will let operators pull far more capacity from the spectrum they already own, and it has framed the launch as one of the most significant shifts in radio architecture in decades.

subject: 诺基亚
object: 基于英伟达的AI-RAN平台，声称业界首个
source_quote: The technical pitch is straightforward. Nokia says the platform has already shown more than 20% spectral efficiency gains, and it is targeting 50% by 2027 and more than 100% by 2028, the point at which, on its own projection, operators could roughly double the capacity of existing spectrum. Those last two figures are targets, not results, and Nokia’s own timeline puts pilots at the end of this year and commercial availability in 2027.

subject: 诺基亚
object: 基于英伟达的AI-RAN平台，声称业界首个
source_quote: Operators would buy the capability through a software subscription rather than a hardware refresh, choosing from three deployment options: a GPU-powered plug-in card for existing AirScale sites, a standalone AI-RAN node, and a cloud-server build delivered through partners.

subject: 印度AI编程初创公司Emergent获1.3亿美元C轮
object: ，估值达15亿美元
source_quote: The funding round was led by private equity firm Creaegis. New investors MNI Ventures-Claypond, Sentinel Global, and existing backers Khosla Ventures, SoftBank’s Vision Fund 2, Lightspeed, and Y Combinator also participated. The deal takes Emergent’s total funding to $230 million. The startup had previously raised a $70 million Series B at a $300 million valuation in January.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Thinking Machines Lab just released Inkling , their first model trained from scratch, weights are open, fine-tunable on Tinker. The lab pitches it as a base for customization.
source_quote: Thinking Machines Lab just released Inkling , their first model trained from scratch, weights are open, fine-tunable on Tinker. The lab pitches it as a base for customization.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: Inkling is a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters and 41B active. It supports a context window of up to 1M tokens. Pretraining covered 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio, and video. Inputs accept text, images, and audio; output is UTF-8 text only.
source_quote: Inkling is a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters and 41B active. It supports a context window of up to 1M tokens. Pretraining covered 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio, and video. Inputs accept text, images, and audio; output is UTF-8 text only.

subject: Thinking Machines Lab
object: The research team also previewed Inkling-Small, a 276B-parameter MoE with 12B active parameters. It matches or exceeds its larger sibling on many benchmarks, and its weights arrive once testing finishes. Because customization/finetuning is the key differentiator, the architecture matters here very much.
source_quote: The research team also previewed Inkling-Small, a 276B-parameter MoE with 12B active parameters. It matches or exceeds its larger sibling on many benchmarks, and its weights arrive once testing finishes. Because customization/finetuning is the key differentiator, the architecture matters here very much.

subject: Anthropic 与私募巨头
object: AI 实施公司 Ode，初始资金 15 亿美元
source_quote: One of those businesses now has a name: Ode with Anthropic is the $1.5 billion, AI implementation company that the AI lab launched in May as part of a joint venture with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs, and others. The move follows OpenAI’s own take on this, The Deployment Company, underscoring a growing acknowledgement among frontier AI labs that winning enterprise customers requires far more than shipping better models.

subject: Anthropic 与私募巨头
object: AI 实施公司 Ode，初始资金 15 亿美元
source_quote: Anthropic’s internal team will continue to focus on strategic, mission-aligned deployments, a spokesperson told TechCrunch. The private equity firms backing Ode will funnel their own portfolio companies to the joint venture as potential customers, though Ode will not limit sales of its services to those companies.

subject: Anthropic 与私募巨头
object: AI 实施公司 Ode，初始资金 15 亿美元
source_quote: Ode was originally conceived by Blackstone, which noticed a gap when it had roped in large consulting firms and small AI services boutiques to implement AI across its portfolio companies. One of those boutiques, AI engineering services startup Fractional AI, apparently stood out, and the joint venture acquired the startup shortly after it was announced. (Fractional ended an 11-month partnership with OpenAI when it was acquired.)

subject: Anthropic 与私募巨头
object: AI 实施公司 Ode，初始资金 15 亿美元
source_quote: Fractional has become the foundation of what is now Ode — a kind of “scaled boutique” AI services firm. And its leaders have ambitious goals.

subject: Vint Cerf
object: Innovation Labs，推动 AI 智能体开放互联网身份识别标准 DNSid
source_quote: Innovation Labs is a subsidiary of Identity Digital, a DNS registry company, which sees domain-name infrastructure as a practical way to hold AI agents accountable and position itself for a future where more online interaction happens between agents than people. Cerf joins a handful of other internet luminaries lending their names to the effort.

subject: Vint Cerf
object: Innovation Labs，推动 AI 智能体开放互联网身份识别标准 DNSid
source_quote: Most AI agents today stay within proprietary systems, calling on internal resources for specific purposes. But businesses are already envisioning a world where they operate far more autonomously across the internet and interact directly with other agents. So far, a key road block has been a lack of a shared standard for identifying and auditing agents.

subject: Vint Cerf
object: Innovation Labs，推动 AI 智能体开放互联网身份识别标准 DNSid
source_quote: A variety of standards are beginning to emerge, and Innovation Labs has proposed DNSid , a system to create identities for agents and link each one to an existing internet domain name, using cryptographic proofs to log its registration over time. Innovation Labs’ interim CEO Allie Kline says the company is trialing the standards with several unnamed hyperscalers and identity companies.

subject: Vint Cerf
object: Innovation Labs，推动 AI 智能体开放互联网身份识别标准 DNSid
source_quote: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet

The deployment consisted of six high-performance Supermicro HGX B300 systems designed to support advanced AI development, machine learning, and high-performance computing (HPC) workloads.

subject: NVIDIA
object: to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI | NVIDIA Blog
source_quote: To meet that need, NVIDIA today introduced the T3000 and T2000, new modules based on the NVIDIA Thor architecture that enable mass-market robotics and edge AI applications at scale.

subject: NVIDIA
object: to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI | NVIDIA Blog
source_quote: Jetson AGX Thor is powering this next generation of humanoid and robotic systems, with growing adoption across industries. Leading companies — including 1X , Agile Robots , Amazon Robotics , Boston Dynamics , FANUC , Hitachi and Techman Robot — are building on the platform.

subject: NVIDIA
object: to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI | NVIDIA Blog
source_quote: Unlocking Humanoid and Robotics Deployment With T3000

subject: NVIDIA
object: to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI | NVIDIA Blog
source_quote: The hardware underpinning those capabilities starts with the Jetson and IGX T3000 modules, which delivers 865 FP4 teraflops of AI compute in a compact form factor roughly half the size and power of the T5000. Jetson T3000 combines an NVIDIA Blackwell GPU, an eight-core Neoverse Arm CPU, 32GB of LPDDR5X memory and 273GB/s of memory bandwidth, along with 25 GbE connectivity. IGX T3000 delivers the same performance with integrated functional safety while seamlessly running the NVIDIA Halos for Robotics full-stack safety system for robots operating alongside humans.

subject: Orthogonal
object: $4.3M to Build the API Layer for AI Agents - The Silicon Valley Post
source_quote: Orthogonal Raises $4.3M to Build the API Layer for AI Agents

subject: Orthogonal
object: $4.3M to Build the API Layer for AI Agents - The Silicon Valley Post
source_quote: Orthogonal ( orthogonal.com ), a YC W26 startup building a unified API and payments layer for AI agents, has raised $4.3M in seed funding from Pantera Capital, Pioneer Fund , Y Combinator, Decasonic, Outbound Capital, Rice Capital, Surreal by Premise, and others, as first reported by The Street .

subject: Orthogonal
object: $4.3M to Build the API Layer for AI Agents - The Silicon Valley Post
source_quote: The entire API economy was built for humans. Agents end up juggling 30+ tools, bloating context, and any API requiring identity or payment means managing accounts, API keys, billing, and auth across dozens of services. When an agent needs a capability it wasn't originally set up with, it either fails or hands the task back to a person.

subject: Orthogonal
object: $4.3M to Build the API Layer for AI Agents - The Silicon Valley Post
source_quote: Orthogonal acts as a single gateway that lets agents discover, access, and pay for hundreds of APIs without separate credentials or subscriptions. Any agent can instantly discover, access, and pay for hundreds of APIs with no subscriptions, no sales calls, just pay per use. On the supply side, API providers list once and get paid every time an agent calls their API.

source_quote: C3 AI (NYSE: AI) today announced that Shell Information Technology International B.V . (“Shell”) is extending its long-standing collaboration with C3 AI across its global operations.

subject: C3 AI and Shell Expand
object: , Scaling Reliability AI Deployment Across Global Asset Operations – Company Announcement - FT.com
source_quote: “C3 AI is the leader in industrial AI, and this expanded partnership with Shell proves what’s possible when Enterprise AI is fully operationalized at global scale for predictive maintenance — reducing unplanned downtime and delivering hundreds of millions of dollars in economic value,” said Stephen Ehikian , President, C3 AI. “Shell has built mature AI predictive maintenance programs on our platform, and together we’re now pushing into agentic AI, advancing how this technology can further transform reliability, safety, efficiency, and operational performance.”

subject: C3 AI and Shell Expand
object: , Scaling Reliability AI Deployment Across Global Asset Operations – Company Announcement - FT.com
source_quote: “What Shell and C3 AI have built on Azure over the past several years is exactly what enterprise AI should look like — real applications, running in production, delivering measurable value at global scale,” said Sandy Gupta , VP GISV, Software Development Companies, Microsoft. “This deepened collaboration is a powerful proof point for what's possible when world-class AI applications meet trusted, secure cloud infrastructure.”

subject: Rubrik Announces Upcoming

subject: Rubrik Announces Upcoming
object: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to Secure AI Agents – Company Announcement - FT.com
source_quote: AWS Summit -- Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK), the Security and AI Operations company, announced today its upcoming Rubrik Agent Cloud (RAC) integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. The upcoming integration reflects Rubrik's commitment to extending the security controls customers already trust into agentic workflows.

subject: Rubrik Announces Upcoming
object: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to Secure AI Agents – Company Announcement - FT.com
source_quote: Unified AI Control Pane: Seamlessly integrates with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, enabling administrators to manage AI security policies from the same Rubrik platform as AWS and hybrid cloud data.

subject: Rubrik Announces Upcoming
object: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to Secure AI Agents – Company Announcement - FT.com
source_quote: "Speed has always been the enterprise mandate, but today, safety is the prerequisite," said Devvret Rishi, General Manager AI, Rubrik. "Cybersecurity leaders estimate that in the next year, half or more of attacks they face will be driven by agentic AI. Rubrik’s upcoming integration with AWS Bedrock AgentCore gives enterprises the confidence to deploy AI agents quickly with trustworthy governance."

subject: xAI
object: a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
source_quote: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company’s Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters , xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood “knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonconsensual images, and generate and distribute CSAM,” breaching the company’s policies.

subject: xAI
object: a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
source_quote: After rolling out a “spicy” mode for Grok last year, xAI added the ability to edit images with the chatbot, leading to a flood of sexualized AI deepfakes, including ones with minors . A group of teens sued xAI in March over claims Grok generated sexualized images of themselves as minors. Musk responded by saying , “Anyone using Grok to make illegal content will suffer the same consequences as if they upload illegal content,” though this appears to be the first time xAI has sued anyone over AI deepfakes created with Grok.

object: Power 自主运维 AI 智能体，可自动监控并修复系统问题
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，IBM 今日宣布推出 Power 自主运维系统（Power Autonomous Operations），这是一款基于 AI 智能体（AI Agent）的系统管理工具，能够持续监控 Power 系统运行状态，并自主解决相关问题，帮助企业保持业务稳定运行。

subject: IBM
object: Power 自主运维 AI 智能体，可自动监控并修复系统问题

subject: OpenAI 前 CTO 穆拉蒂创业公司 TML
object: Inkling：9750 亿参数，借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构
source_quote: 穆拉蒂领导的 Thinking Machines Lab 在周三发布了公司的首款 AI 模型，并采用了“开放权重”模式，这意味着其他开发者可以结合自己的数据对模型进行修改。

subject: OpenAI 前 CTO 穆拉蒂创业公司 TML
object: Inkling：9750 亿参数，借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构
source_quote: 无论是在开源模型还是闭源模型中，Inkling 都不是目前整体性能最强的模型。

subject: OpenAI 前 CTO 穆拉蒂创业公司 TML
object: Inkling：9750 亿参数，借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构
source_quote: 这款名为 Inkling 的模型拥有 9750 亿个参数，规模远小于外界对 OpenAI、Anthropic 等竞争对手最先进闭源模型的预估参数。

subject: OpenAI 前 CTO 穆拉蒂创业公司 TML
object: Inkling：9750 亿参数，借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构
source_quote: 穆拉蒂 Thinking Machines 称，Inkling 基础模型的架构借鉴了中国的 DeepSeek-V3 模型，并在后训练阶段使用了由月之暗面公司 Kimi K2.5 生成的数据进行了优化。

source_quote: IT之家 7 月 16 日消息，OpenAI 今天（7 月 16 日）携手 Work Louder，合作推出 kbd-1.0-codex-micro 键盘，售价为 230 美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 1560 元人民币）。

subject: OpenAI 首款联名
object: ，灵活操控 AI 智能体
source_quote: 本次官方推出的 kbd-1.0-codex-micro 键盘共有 clicky（有声段落）和 silent（静音）两个键轴版本，前者按键时有明显的“咔哒”声与段落感，适合喜欢清脆敲击反馈和节奏感的用户；后者采用低音设计，按键音量极小，手感顺滑，适合在办公室或安静的共享空间使用。

source_quote: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，一群出版商和作家已对谷歌提起集体诉讼，指控这家科技巨头未经授权使用他们的版权作品训练其人工智能平台 Gemini。

subject: 出版商与作者集体

source_quote: 诉讼还指控，谷歌曾故意删除或修改这些作品中的版权信息，以“掩盖 Gemini 模型是基于被盗资料训练而成的事实”。

subject: Whatnot
object: Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
source_quote: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations

subject: Whatnot
object: Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
source_quote: Livestream shopping app Whatnot announced Wednesday that it has acquired Shaped , a machine learning company that specializes in real-time recommendation and search systems. The deal is meant to strengthen Whatnot’s discovery and personalization capabilities as the platform continues to expand across new product categories and millions of buyers.

subject: Whatnot
object: Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
source_quote: According to the company, the acquisition helps Whatnot continue its investment in AI as it looks to solve one of live commerce’s biggest challenges: helping shoppers find the right products while inventory, auctions, and buyer demand change in real time.

subject: Whatnot
object: Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
source_quote: As part of the acquisition, Shaped founder and CEO Tullie Murrell, along with nearly a dozen engineers and AI researchers, will join Whatnot. Murrell will lead the company’s newly formed Applied AI Research group. (Notably, Murrell worked at Meta before launching Shaped.)

subject: xai-org/grok-build, now
object: xai-org/grok-build, now open source ( via ) xAI's grok CLI tool faced severe community backlash yesterday when it became apparent that running the command in a directory could upload that entire directory to xAI's Google Cloud buckets. One user reported running it in their home directory and seeing it upload "my SSH keys, my password manager database, my documents, photos, videos, everything".
source_quote: xai-org/grok-build, now open source ( via ) xAI's grok CLI tool faced severe community backlash yesterday when it became apparent that running the command in a directory could upload that entire directory to xAI's Google Cloud buckets. One user reported running it in their home directory and seeing it upload "my SSH keys, my password manager database, my documents, photos, videos, everything".

subject: xai-org/grok-build, now
object: A few hours ago they also released the entire Grok Build codebase under an Apache 2.0 license - presumably to try and regain trust from their users. From their thread announcing the new repository :
source_quote: A few hours ago they also released the entire Grok Build codebase under an Apache 2.0 license - presumably to try and regain trust from their users. From their thread announcing the new repository :

subject: xai-org/grok-build, now
object: With all retained data deleted, retention default off, and an open-source harness, we are offering complete user privacy. You can also run Grok Build fully open-sourced and local-first with your own inference.
source_quote: With all retained data deleted, retention default off, and an open-source harness, we are offering complete user privacy. You can also run Grok Build fully open-sourced and local-first with your own inference.

subject: xai-org/grok-build, now
object: I've not seen an official explanation for why it was doing this, but xAI did respond to the feedback ( Musk : "As a precautionary measure, all user data that was uploaded to SpaceXAI before now will be completely and utterly deleted.") and have disabled the feature.
source_quote: I've not seen an official explanation for why it was doing this, but xAI did respond to the feedback ( Musk : "As a precautionary measure, all user data that was uploaded to SpaceXAI before now will be completely and utterly deleted.") and have disabled the feature.

subject: Exclusive: Startup Adapter
object: 7.8M To Bring New 'Cognition' To AI Tools
source_quote: Exclusive: Startup Adapter Launches With $17.8M To Bring New 'Cognition' To AI Tools

subject: Exclusive: Startup Adapter
object: 7.8M To Bring New 'Cognition' To AI Tools
source_quote: Now, after three and a half years of operating in stealth, Ghetti is unveiling Adapter to the world. Based in Austin, Texas, the startup employs 17 people and has raised $17.8 million in capital to date from GV, Bond Partners (an early-stage fund within BOND), and a number of other investors including Eric Schmidt’s family office Hillspire, Byers Capital, the funds of former Lookout founder Kevin Patrick Mahaffey and Shana Fischer, and personal investors including Paul Judge, Zach Sims and Ted Schlein.

subject: Exclusive: Startup Adapter
object: 7.8M To Bring New 'Cognition' To AI Tools
source_quote: Repeat founder Adam Ghetti returns with a startup backed by GV and others to provide better 'cognition' for your AI use -- all while keeping your data safe from labs like OpenAI.

subject: Exclusive: Startup Adapter
object: 7.8M To Bring New 'Cognition' To AI Tools
source_quote: Adapter founders Adam Ghetti and David Bader are hoping developers will build new AI tools on top of their new knowledge graph. Credit: Adapter

subject: Mozilla 2026 开源 AI
object: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，Mozilla 昨日（7 月 14 日）发布 2026 年《开源 AI 现状报告》， 基于 2026 年 3 月 Chatbot Arena 数据显示，开放权重 AI 模型能力和闭源模型的平均差距为 3.3%。
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，Mozilla 昨日（7 月 14 日）发布 2026 年《开源 AI 现状报告》， 基于 2026 年 3 月 Chatbot Arena 数据显示，开放权重 AI 模型能力和闭源模型的平均差距为 3.3%。

subject: Mozilla 2026 开源 AI
object: 报告指出基于 Chatbot Arena 平台数据，开源模型与闭源模型的差距在过去 24 个月内逐渐缩小。
source_quote: 报告指出基于 Chatbot Arena 平台数据，开源模型与闭源模型的差距在过去 24 个月内逐渐缩小。

subject: Mozilla 2026 开源 AI
object: 不过该报告指出 3.3% 只是一个平均值，实际差距并不大：在编码、指令执行和通用知识方面，开放模型与封闭模型基本持平或接近，而差距则集中在推理、长上下文检索和智能体任务上。
source_quote: 不过该报告指出 3.3% 只是一个平均值，实际差距并不大：在编码、指令执行和通用知识方面，开放模型与封闭模型基本持平或接近，而差距则集中在推理、长上下文检索和智能体任务上。

subject: Mozilla 2026 开源 AI
object: 细分到模型方面，基于 2026 年 6 月全球最大 AI 聚合平台 OpenRouter 数据， 在 API 调用月消耗量 Tokens 方面，前五名均为开源模型 ，其中 DeepSeek V4 Flash 凭借 18.4T Tokens 位居榜首；小米 Mimo-V2.5 以 14.9T Tokens 位居第二；腾讯 Hy3 Preview 模型以 14.8T Tokens 位居第三。
source_quote: 细分到模型方面，基于 2026 年 6 月全球最大 AI 聚合平台 OpenRouter 数据， 在 API 调用月消耗量 Tokens 方面，前五名均为开源模型 ，其中 DeepSeek V4 Flash 凭借 18.4T Tokens 位居榜首；小米 Mimo-V2.5 以 14.9T Tokens 位居第二；腾讯 Hy3 Preview 模型以 14.8T Tokens 位居第三。

subject: 交友应用 Soul 将
object: ，搭载自研大模型 SoulX 亮相 WAIC 2026
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，据“读佳”报道，交友应用 Soul 将推出首款便携式 AI 智能硬件产品，该产品预计将于 7 月 17 日至 20 日举行的 2026 世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议（WAIC）期间首次公开亮相。

subject: 交友应用 Soul 将
object: ，搭载自研大模型 SoulX 亮相 WAIC 2026
source_quote: 据介绍， 该产品定位情绪陪伴，会将自研语言大模型 SoulX 的语音交互、情感表达和数字生命能力融入其中 。

subject: DeepSeek
object: plans 📈, Kalshi compute markets ⚡, Bonsai phone model 📱
source_quote: Google announces Gemma 4 optimized for the Pixel 10's TPU (2 minute read)

subject: DeepSeek
object: plans 📈, Kalshi compute markets ⚡, Bonsai phone model 📱
source_quote: Gemma 4 E2B for TPU is designed to run natively on the Pixel 10's TPU. It supports instant, deep offline conversation, image identification, and on-device audio transcription. The model also lets users command core phone functions, like Wi-Fi or maps, using just private voice or text. Video demonstrations of what the model can do are available in the article.

subject: 苹果
object: OpenAI员工窃密案：2封邮件与1次姓名混淆致沟通受阻
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 16 日消息，NBC 昨日（7 月 15 日）发布博文，在苹果和 OpenAI 公司的商业纠纷案件中， 2 封关键邮件、13 分钟间隔与 1 次姓名混淆，构成双方起诉前沟通受阻的核心细节。

subject: 苹果
object: OpenAI员工窃密案：2封邮件与1次姓名混淆致沟通受阻
source_quote: IT之家本月报道， 苹果公司上周在美国加州北区联邦法院起诉 OpenAI ，指控该公司数名员工窃取未发布产品、零部件和供应商关系等高级商业机密。

subject: 苹果
object: OpenAI员工窃密案：2封邮件与1次姓名混淆致沟通受阻
source_quote: 诉讼文件指出，苹果在 2026 年 2 月曾致函 OpenAI，要求说明防范措施、调查情况与补救安排，但 OpenAI“从未回应”。

subject: 金山办公
object: WPS Comate AI 办公客户端
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 15 日消息，在今天的 2026 金山办公 AI 生产力大会上，金山办公正式推出了 WPS 365 家庭新成员 —— WPS Comate。

subject: 金山办公
object: WPS Comate AI 办公客户端
source_quote: 根据官方定义， 这是一款面向员工的 AI 办公客户端 。

subject: 金山办公
object: WPS Comate AI 办公客户端
source_quote: 据介绍，WPS Comate 可连接组织数据、系统、流程，让 AI 融入到组织工作流中，交付业务结果，支持个人提效、团队沉淀和组织赋能，并提供覆盖全工作场景的六大模块，包括：AI 岗位专家、Skill 技能生态、自动化任务、团队协作空间、Wiki 知识库和应用广场。

subject: 金山办公
object: WPS Comate AI 办公客户端
source_quote: 另外，WPS Comate 还拥有“企业大脑”，可联动 WPS AI Docs（非结构化数据治理）、WPS AI Hub（模型调度与运营）、WPS Data Hub（结构化数据治理）和 WPS API Hub（内部系统接入）。

subject: Meta employees
object: over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems
source_quote: Meta employees sue over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems

subject: Meta employees
object: over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems
source_quote: Meta employees sue over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems

subject: Meta employees
object: over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems
source_quote: Former and current Meta employees are suing the company in a California federal court over AI-driven mass layoffs. Meta allegedly used internal AI systems to generate the layoff lists when it cut 8,000 workers, disproportionately targeting employees with disabilities or on parental leave.

subject: Meta employees
object: over layoffs they say were driven by discriminatory AI selection systems
source_quote: Former and current Meta employees are suing the company in a California federal court over AI-driven mass layoffs. Meta allegedly used internal AI systems to generate the layoff lists when it cut 8,000 workers, disproportionately targeting employees with disabilities or on parental leave.
